author: barnabasbusa
content: do we need to resync with the new image or should be able to reorg itself out?

author: mattsse
content:
I'm pretty sure a simple restart should be sufficient
what I believe happened is the same cache bug on bal-devnet-7 where we incorrectly marked a block as invalid
